Package com.boschrexroth.api

Interface Converter

public interface Converter
Converter interface

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    byte[]
    generateJsonComplex(byte[] data, byte[] ty, int indentStep)
    This function generate a JSON string out of a Variant with complex type (flatbuffers) and the metadata of this data

    This function generate a JSON string out of a Variant witch have a simple data type

  • Method Details

    • getLastError

      Result getLastError()
      get last error
      Returns:
      Result of function calls

    • getSchema

      byte[] getSchema(Schema schema)
      This funtion returns the type (schema) 
      
 try (com.boschrexroth.api.DlSystem s = com.boschrexroth.api.DlSystem.create("")) {
   Converter c = s.JSONConverter();
   byte[] m = c.getSchema(Schema.MEMORY);
   ...
 }
 ...
      Parameters:
      schema - Requested Schema
      Returns:
      array of byte, which contains the type (schema)

    • generateJsonSimple

      byte[] generateJsonSimple(Variant data, int indentStep)
      This function generate a JSON string out of a Variant witch have a simple data type 
      
 try (com.boschrexroth.api.DlSystem s = com.boschrexroth.api.DlSystem.create("")) {
   Converter c = s.JSONConverter();
   Variant data = Variant.create();
   data.setSTRING("This is a test");
   byte[] vals = converter.generateJsonSimple(data, -1);
   String txt = new String(vals);
   //txt = "{\"type\":\"string\",\"value\":\"This is a test\"}"
   ...
 }
 ...
      Parameters:
      data - A Variant which contains data with simple data type
      indentStep - Indentation length for json string
      Returns:
      Generated JSON as array of byte

    • parseJsonSimple

      String parseJsonSimple(String json, Variant data)
      This function generates out of a JSON string containing the (simple) data 
      
 try (com.boschrexroth.api.DlSystem s = com.boschrexroth.api.DlSystem.create("")) {
   Converter c = s.JSONConverter();
   Variant data = Variant.create();
   data.setSTRING("This is a test");
   byte[] vals = converter.generateJsonSimple(data, -1);
   Variant output = Variant.create();
   String txt = new String(vals);
 
   String err = converter.parseJsonSimple(txt, output);
   //output.getSTRING(), "This is a test"
 
   data.setInt32(123);
   vals = converter.generateJsonSimple(data, -1);
   txt = new String(vals);
   //txt = "{\"type\":\"int32\",\"value\":123}"
   err = converter.parseJsonSimple(txt, output);
   //output.getInt32(), 123
   ...
 }
 ...
      Parameters:
      json - Data as a json string
      data - [out] A Variant which contains the data
      Returns:
      Error string or empty (no error)

    • parseJsonSimple

      String parseJsonSimple(byte[] json, Variant data)
      This function generates out of a JSON string containing the (simple) data 
      
 try (com.boschrexroth.api.DlSystem s = com.boschrexroth.api.DlSystem.create("")) {
   Converter c = s.JSONConverter();
   Variant data = Variant.create();
   data.setSTRING("This is a test");
   byte[] vals = converter.generateJsonSimple(data, -1);
 
   Variant output = Variant.create();  
   String err = converter.parseJsonSimple(vals, output);
   //output.getSTRING(), "This is a test"
 
   data.setInt32(123);
   vals = converter.generateJsonSimple(data, -1);
   err = converter.parseJsonSimple(vals, output);
   //output.getInt32(), 123
   ...
 }
 ...
      Parameters:
      json - Data as a json array of byte
      data - [out] A Variant which contains the data
      Returns:
      Error string or empty (no error)

    • generateJsonComplex

      byte[] generateJsonComplex(byte[] data, byte[] ty, int indentStep)
      This function generate a JSON string out of a Variant with complex type (flatbuffers) and the metadata of this data 
      
 try (com.boschrexroth.api.DlSystem s = com.boschrexroth.api.DlSystem.create("")) {
   Converter c = s.JSONConverter();
 
   byte[] m = c.getSchema(Schema.MEMORY);
   byte[] rs = c.getSchema(Schema.REFLECTION);
   byte[] st = c.generateJsonComplex(m, rs, -1);
   Variant err = Variant.create();
   byte[] data = converter.parseJsonComplex(m, rs, err);
   ...
 }
 ...
      Parameters:
      data - which contains data of complex data type (flatbuffers) if data is empty type is converted to json schema
      ty - which contains type of data (Variant with flatbuffers BFBS)
      indentStep - Indentation length for json string
      Returns:
      Generated JSON as array of byte

    • parseJsonComplex

      byte[] parseJsonComplex(byte[] json, byte[] ty, Variant error)
      This function generates a Variant out of a JSON string containing the (complex) data.
      Parameters:
      json - is an array of bytes containing a json string.
      ty - is an array of bytes that contains type of data (Variant with bfbs flatbuffer content).
      error - Error as error string
      Returns:
      data (array of byte) which contains the data

    • parseJsonComplex

      byte[] parseJsonComplex(String json, byte[] ty, Variant error)
      This function generates a Variant out of a JSON string containing the (complex) data.
      Parameters:
      json - is containing a json string.
      ty - is an array of bytes that contains type of data (Variant with bfbs flatbuffer content).
      error - Error as error string
      Returns:
      data (array of byte) which contains the data
